mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node (id, parent_id, type, name, position, content, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{type}, #{name}, #{position}, #{content}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{deletedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY parent_id, position, id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position), 0) FROM node WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND parent_id = #{parentId} parent_id IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE node SET parent_id = #{parentId}, position = #{position} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tag WHERE node_id IN #{i}
mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM node c LEFT JOIN node p ON c.parent_id = p.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND (p.id IS NULL OR p.deleted_at IS NULL) ORDER BY c.deleted_at DESC
SELECT c.* FROM node c LEFT JOIN node p ON c.parent_id = p.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND c.deleted_at < #{cutoff} AND (p.id IS NULL OR p.deleted_at IS NULL) ORDER BY c.deleted_at
SELECT node_id, tag FROM tag ORDER BY node_id, tag
SELECT tag FROM tag WHERE node_id = #{nodeId} ORDER BY tag
